vol_name: A longitudinal study of how university students transitioned during COVID-19 pandemic
vol_description:
● Longitudinal dataset tracking students’ transition into virtual learning during the COVID-19 pandemic with two time points: Time 1 (2020) and Time 2 (2021).
● Measures include qualitative & quantitative questions on COVID-19 as well as Brief Coping Scale, Online Teaching, Differential Emotions Scale, Cognitive Engagement, Flourishing, and Post Traumatic Growth.
● Participant sample comprises students in STEM and Psychology majors or non-STEM majors.
● Participant demographic data includes age, gender, racial background, parental educational background, year in university, college major, and GPA.
● For full breakdown of measures, sub-scales, demographic variables, please refer to uploaded codebook on Databrary. 
● To contact research team, please email Viviane Seyranian, Ph.D. at vseyranian@cpp.edu.
